title: Machine Learning Engineer II, AGI Customization
required_qualifications: 3+ years of non-internship professional software development experience
2+ years of non-internship design or architecture (design patterns, reliability and scaling) of new and existing systems experience
Experience programming with at least one software programming language
preferred_qualifications: 3+ years of full software development life cycle, including coding standards, code reviews, source control management, build processes, testing, and operations experience
Bachelor's degree in computer science or equivalent
responsibilities: Leading the development of novel LLM training techniques and optimizations to advance the state of LLMs.

Collaborate closely with Applied Scientists and leverage Amazon’s heterogeneous data sources and large-scale computing resources to accelerate development of multimodal Large Language Models and Generative Artificial Intelligence solutions.
Creating reliable, scalable, and high performance AI products.
education: Bachelor's degree in computer science or equivalent (preferred)
